description:
The editors of YogiApproved.com love yoga and everything related to living a healthy and natural lifestyle. We pride ourselves on keeping our finger on the pulse of the industry, and we take reviewing the latest trends and products very seriously. Our Favorite Things is a monthly recurring article and video featuring all of our editor’s latest finds that we want to share with you!

Here are 7 yoga and yogic lifestyle products we are loving this month at YogiApproved.com:

Nickelodeon Kids Yoga Mats by Dragonfly Yoga
http://www.dfyoga.com/ninja-turtles-michelangelo-retro-yoga-mat


Marble Yoga Leggings by OMGI Yoga
http://omgiyoga.com/products/marble-leggings-essentials?variant=25643052550


Hazel Halter Crop Top by Montiel
http://www.montiel.com/collections/bras/products/hazel-halter-crop-in-eggplant


YogaSpheres by Mama Kuka
http://bit.ly/2dp4FMV


Leaf Infusion Deodorant from Blue Beautifly
https://www.bluebeautifly.com/shop/leaf-infusion-deodorant/


MONQ Zen + Vibrant Personal Essential Oil Diffuser
https://monq.com/blends/zen/


Matcha Latte and Maca Cold Brew by REBBL Elixir
http://rebbl.co/where-to-buy/


What were your favorite featured products? Please share any comments or questions below – we love hearing from you.
 
Thanks so much for watching!! Be sure to join us next month!


Come hang out with us at: http://www.yogiapproved.com/

Download our free ebook - 5 Tips to Live a Healthier life Now
http://www.yogiapproved.com/free-ebook/


Follow us on social: 

Facebook -
https://www.facebook.com/YogiApproved/

Instagram -

Don't forget to subscribe to our YouTube channel for more product reviews and free yoga and wellness videos. :)
